system.description:
The art of operating while being unseen and unheard. This skill can also cover breaking and entering, sleight-of-hand, and pickpocketing.
  • Picking a simple lock: Sneak/DEX 8+
  • Skulking past a pair of guards at night: Sneak/DEX 8+ (or Opposed)
  • Walking across a wooden floor without making it creak: Sneak/DEX 10+
  • Stealing a coin-purse from an unsuspecting victim: Sneak/DEX 10+
  • Attempting to sneak a dagger into a banquet: Sneak/INT 10+
system.shortdescr: Moving unseen and unheard; also lockpicking and pickpocketing.
